# midi-chord-notator-web

A high-performance, musically accurate MIDI notation web application.

## Documentation
- [PROJECT_STATE.md](./PROJECT_STATE.md): Current architecture, capabilities, and recent evolution.
- [README.md](./README.md): Project overview, features, and quick start.
- [ROOT_SPELLING_ALGORITHM.md](./ROOT_SPELLING_ALGORITHM.md): Technical details of the scale root spelling engine.

## Core Modules
- `src/components/NotationCanvas.tsx`: Main imperative rendering engine.
- `src/components/toolbar/TransformationsDrawer.tsx`: MIDI-mappable transformation controller.
- `src/midi/MIDIProvider.tsx`: OMNI MIDI input routing.
- `src/utils/chordSpeller.ts`: Enharmonic spelling and PCS LUT integration.
- `src/audio/engine.ts`: Tone.js audio engine wrapper.
